## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between NBD and GrowthX to discuss content strategy progress and technical issues.](https://fathom.video/share/s5u1-bM69PFkR4VyhmNtHx8Nwea2oqJY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [20 articles live, 10 more going live this week; 40-50 new topics planned for next week](https://fathom.video/share/s5u1-bM69PFkR4VyhmNtHx8Nwea2oqJY?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Minor technical issues identified: blog page loading glitch, indexing discrepancies in Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/s5u1-bM69PFkR4VyhmNtHx8Nwea2oqJY?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Content performance metrics to be monitored; discussions on article improvements and CRO planned for future](https://fathom.video/share/s5u1-bM69PFkR4VyhmNtHx8Nwea2oqJY?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)

## Topics

### Content Progress and Planning

  - [20 articles now live on the blog, frontend layout looking good](https://fathom.video/share/s5u1-bM69PFkR4VyhmNtHx8Nwea2oqJY?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [10 more articles going live this week, totaling 30](https://fathom.video/share/s5u1-bM69PFkR4VyhmNtHx8Nwea2oqJY?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [40-50 new topics to be proposed early next week (before Wednesday)](https://fathom.video/share/s5u1-bM69PFkR4VyhmNtHx8Nwea2oqJY?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Consistent weekly publishing schedule established](https://fathom.video/share/s5u1-bM69PFkR4VyhmNtHx8Nwea2oqJY?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)

### Technical Issues and SEO

  - [Blog page loading glitch: "load more" button disappears in Chrome](https://fathom.video/share/s5u1-bM69PFkR4VyhmNtHx8Nwea2oqJY?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Google Search Console:](https://fathom.video/share/s5u1-bM69PFkR4VyhmNtHx8Nwea2oqJY?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
      - [Only 3 articles indexed initially; Andrej manually submitted others for faster indexing](https://fathom.video/share/s5u1-bM69PFkR4VyhmNtHx8Nwea2oqJY?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
      - [Sitemap was missing, now submitted](https://fathom.video/share/s5u1-bM69PFkR4VyhmNtHx8Nwea2oqJY?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
      - [438 non-indexed pages vs 20,159 indexed pages](https://fathom.video/share/s5u1-bM69PFkR4VyhmNtHx8Nwea2oqJY?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
      - [Key pages (home, case studies, services) not indexed](https://fathom.video/share/s5u1-bM69PFkR4VyhmNtHx8Nwea2oqJY?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Andrej to send screenshot/export of non-indexed pages for developer review](https://fathom.video/share/s5u1-bM69PFkR4VyhmNtHx8Nwea2oqJY?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)

### Performance Monitoring and Optimization

  - [Too early for meaningful metrics, but monitoring to begin soon](https://fathom.video/share/s5u1-bM69PFkR4VyhmNtHx8Nwea2oqJY?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Future discussions planned (async via Slack) on:](https://fathom.video/share/s5u1-bM69PFkR4VyhmNtHx8Nwea2oqJY?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
      - [Improving articles with additional images, infographics, illustrations](https://fathom.video/share/s5u1-bM69PFkR4VyhmNtHx8Nwea2oqJY?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
      - [Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) strategies](https://fathom.video/share/s5u1-bM69PFkR4VyhmNtHx8Nwea2oqJY?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
      - [Implementing in-content CTAs for lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/s5u1-bM69PFkR4VyhmNtHx8Nwea2oqJY?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Eli to log blog page loading issue as a bug for developer attention](https://fathom.video/share/s5u1-bM69PFkR4VyhmNtHx8Nwea2oqJY?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Andrej to send recap email with:](https://fathom.video/share/s5u1-bM69PFkR4VyhmNtHx8Nwea2oqJY?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
      - [Screenshot/export of non-indexed pages from Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/s5u1-bM69PFkR4VyhmNtHx8Nwea2oqJY?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
      - [Suggestions for article improvements and overall performance optimization](https://fathom.video/share/s5u1-bM69PFkR4VyhmNtHx8Nwea2oqJY?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [Team to continue monitoring content performance as more articles go live](https://fathom.video/share/s5u1-bM69PFkR4VyhmNtHx8Nwea2oqJY?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Async discussion on Slack about CRO and article improvements to include wider team](https://fathom.video/share/s5u1-bM69PFkR4VyhmNtHx8Nwea2oqJY?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
